RACE-CREW
Executive Member · URE RACE-CREW TEAM

MD MOTAHER HOSSAIN
SOHEL

As a Food, Medal, and Logistics Support Leader at URE Race-Crew Team, I am responsible for managing essential event operations during marathons, running events, and fitness programs. My role includes organizing food and refreshment distribution for participants and volunteers, handling medal preparation and award management, and ensuring smooth logistics support throughout the event. I coordinate with team members to maintain proper scheduling, equipment setup, and participant support services. The URE Race-Crew Team focuses on creating well-organized and successful sporting events that promote fitness, teamwork, and community engagement. Through strong leadership, coordination, and planning, we work together to deliver memorable and professionally managed events for all participants.

About

URE RACE-CREW TEAM

The URE RACE-CREW TEAM provides skilled and professional race-crew support for running events, marathons, charity runs, and fitness programs. The team values teamwork, discipline, responsibility, and community engagement to ensure that every event is safe, organized, and successful. Creating a positive and memorable experience for participants, organizers, and audiences is one of the main goals of the team.
